data.title: Prototype: fix scatter layout (real image dimensions)

data.body: Fix the current scatter/infinite canvas layout. Root cause: aspect ratios in canvas-layout.ts are randomly seeded from slug hash, not from actual image dimensions. Images render at their real aspect ratio (width:100%, height:auto) but layout allocates space based on fake ratios → overlap. Fix: use real image dimensions or at minimum a consistent default. Switchable via ?layout=scatter.
